summary: First-run full E2E testing of HomeNest house-sitting app. Ran 19 pytest tests (auth + forms CRUD + public share + email 503 + google-session 401) — all 19 PASS. Executed full frontend Playwright flow: landing, auth guard redirect, register → dashboard, 6-step form builder (dates → stay → pets → care → tasks → contacts), Finish & share modal, public /share/{token} render, dashboard list/copy, logout, and re-login. All flows work; no critical issues found.

minor.issue: Endpoint is not protected (does not require auth). It always returns 200 even without a session. Low severity but inconsistent with REST expectations.
Performs two DB queries (one already returning the doc, another with {user_id:1}). Minor efficiency issue — the first find_one already has user_id available if projection were adjusted.

issues: Unauthenticated /dashboard redirects to /login (intended) — spec said redirect to /login, which matches. No issue.

action_items: (Optional/minor) Consider adding auth requirement on POST /api/auth/logout for consistency, or at least ignoring silently (currently does this correctly for non-session tokens).
(Optional) Simplify /api/public/forms/{share_token} to a single query by allowing user_id in projection then stripping after lookup.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 79-82: Cookies use samesite='none' + secure=True — correct for cross-site cookie flow in this preview domain, works as tested.
FormBuilder.jsx is 1042 lines — recommend splitting each Step into its own file/module (maintainability, file-size rule >700 lines).
server.py: _build_email_html is inlined — fine for now, but will grow; consider templates (jinja) when email features expand.
server.py line 473: greeting injection uses html.replace on an exact phrase; fragile if copy changes. Consider template placeholders like {{greeting}}.
server.py admin-seed (lines 494-510) correctly updates admin password if changed — good idempotent behaviour.
CORS configured with explicit origin from FRONTEND_URL env var + localhost fallback; credentials allowed — correct.
JWT secret read from env, bcrypt hash format $2b$ verified indirectly via successful login — good.
Forms endpoints correctly exclude _id in projections — good (serialize_form also pops _id defensively).
test_credentials: Seeded admin admin@housesit.app/admin123 works. Test users created dynamically via /api/auth/register.
seed_data_creation: One test form created under a freshly-registered test user (TEST_ prefix in title). Forms remain in DB tied to test users; low impact as each run uses a unique uuid-suffixed email.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all 19 critical paths. Re-run with `pytest backend/tests/backend_test.py -v`. RESEND_API_KEY intentionally empty — /api/forms/{form_id}/send-email returns 503 (verified). Google OAuth endpoint expects a real Emergent session_id; tests assert 401/502 for invalid IDs. Share token flow end-to-end verified on preview URL.
rca of the issue: No bugs found; app is functioning as specified in the requirements.
